services: Print/Collateral Design (gift bags, QR review cards)
typical_monthly_usd: $2,500-$4,000 base retainer + ad spend + Shopgenie SaaS
setup_fee_usd: $1,000-$2,500 one-time (industry standard, includes creative + brand asset work)
min_ad_spend_usd: $500/mo Meta minimum typical; growth shops run $1,000-$2,000/mo
cancellation_policy: Unconfirmed; comparable agencies require 30-day written notice
asset_ownership: Unconfirmed; client likely owns site + ad accounts (industry standard for specialist agencies)

10 call scoring/mo is sampling, not full QA
cons: Collision dept under-served (Heather doing CR posts herself)
CR follow-up creates duplication with Carwise/CCC outbound
No published OEM or DRP positioning expertise
koffman_relevance: Current vendor for AR social + CRM + call scoring. Strong on AR retention; weak on CR acquisition. PSG could replace fully OR layer over (CR-focused) while leaving Turnkey on AR. Most likely PSG replaces for consolidation + measurement.
